//: Drop these into the project's package.json `scripts` block. Adjust as needed.

scripts.//prepare: Required. Runs once after `npm install`; activates the typia + @nestia/core transforms and re-enables JSDoc parsing on TypeScript 5.3+. Without this, nestia silently no-ops.
scripts.//build: Plain tsc — must NOT be SWC, esbuild, or Babel. Nestia needs type info at compile time.
scripts.//sdk: Regenerate the SDK from controllers. Run on every controller change.
scripts.//e2e-gen: Scaffold E2E test files for new routes (preserves existing files).
scripts.//all: Regenerate SDK + swagger + e2e in one go.
scripts.//prebuild: Make sure the SDK and swagger are fresh before every build.
scripts.prebuild: npm run sdk && npm run swagger
scripts.//test: Plain Jest. The auto-generated E2E files in test/features/api/ are picked up by DynamicExecutor.validate, not Jest — see references/e2e-testing.md.
